title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses why he started a second company after already building a unicorn. He emphasizes that success came from focused differentiation and refusing to replicate existing solutions rather than building larger models or better pitches.
